_about: Source registry. Every curated record's _meta.sources[] id resolves here. fetch.py maintains content_sha256 + fetched_at for downloaded artifacts.

sources.title: Handritsstyrkir fyrir leiknar kvikmyndir (grant detail page)
sources.notes: Authoritative current amounts: 1./2. handritsstyrkur 1.5M each, 1.+2. samtímis 3.0M. Includes reyndur höfundur/framleiðandi definitions.

sources.title: Handritsstyrkir fyrir leikið sjónvarpsefni (grant detail page)
sources.notes: Current amounts: I/II 1.5M, III 3.0M; total screenwriting cap 3.0M per project.

sources.title: Fyrir leikið efni í fullri lengd — þróun & framleiðsla (detail page)
sources.notes: Development & production amounts: 'Upphæð fer eftir umfangi verkefnis' (scope-dependent, no fixed cap). 2. þróunarstyrkur only for projects with a production-grant vilyrði.

sources.title: Framleiðslustyrkir (production grant detail page)
sources.notes: Production amounts scope-dependent; processing 10-12 weeks.

sources.title: Eftirvinnslustyrkir fyrir leiknar kvikmyndir (post-production detail page)
sources.notes: Post-production Hámarksupphæð 15.000.000 kr.

sources.title: KMÍ web-page snapshots (data/raw/html/)
sources.notes: 18 server-rendered KMÍ pages fetched via ingest/fetch.py (raw .html + extracted .txt). The umsokn.* application portal is login-gated and not fetchable.

sources.title: KMÍ full sitemap mirror (342 pages)
sources.notes: Full KMÍ site mirror (342 pages, .html+.txt). Parsed by ingest/kmi_site.py: áhorf/* annual TV-viewership tables -> lx_viewership (authoritative, confidence=verified, content-year from title); frettir/kvikmyndamenning/um/kvikmyndagerd pages -> corpus_article (Zone 3, content from <main id="main">, nav stripped). Grant detail pages also drive Zone 1 (see src.kmi_* html sources).

sources.title: IMDb official datasets (title.principals, name.basics)
sources.notes: Personal/non-commercial license — NOT redistributable. Principal cast + key crew (director/writer/producer/cinematographer(DoP)/editor/composer/production_designer/cast) with nconst strong keys. Does NOT include full department crew (gaffers, line producers). FALLBACK only — superseded for content by src.imdbinfo (full credits). Cinemagoer/web scraping is blocked (HTTP 202). Streamed+filtered to our tconsts via ingest/imdb_datasets.py.

sources.title: IMDb full credits via imdbinfo (tveronesi/imdbinfo)
sources.notes: PRIMARY IMDb enrichment. MIT-licensed library that parses IMDb's modern embedded JSON → the FULL credits page (~50 departments incl. camera/sound/editorial/make-up/VFX/assistant-director and, when IMDb lists them, gaffers & line producers), plus company_credits (production/sales/distribution), awards tallies, worldwide_gross, production_budget, AKAs. Strong keys: nconst (people), conmst (companies). DATA is still IMDb's & scraped — same rule as src.imdb_datasets: PRIVATE research only, NEVER ship any IMDb-derived field in export/. Throttled + WAF backoff via ingest/imdb_enrich.py; persistent parser failures (e.g. KeyError 'rowTitle') are skipped to failures.json with src.imdb_datasets as fallback.

sources.title: Klapptré.is — Icelandic film-industry news (WordPress REST API)
sources.notes: ZONE 3 corpus + landscape facts. WordPress REST API (clean JSON, only /wp-admin robots-disallowed). Phase 1 pulled the 5 structured 'fact' categories (~1,705 posts): Aðsóknartölur(108)+Áhorfstölur(1423)→lx_admissions/lx_viewership, Gagnrýni(106)→lx_review, Verðlaun(160)/Tilnefningar(161)→lx_award; all → corpus_article + corpus_mention. Box-office numbers come from HTML TABLES, scope-tagged IS(domestic)/WW(worldwide, 'á heimsvísu'); >500k admissions dropped as mislabeled ISK gross. JOURNALISTIC/COPYRIGHTED: local-only, NEVER committed, NEVER in export/. Isolated — grant tools never join Zone 3. ingest/klapptre.py (ingester + extractors); KMI_CATS=all mirrors the whole site (later RAG phase).

sources.title: The Numbers (Nash Information Services) — box office
sources.notes: REFERENCE ONLY — no scraper built. US/intl theatrical box office; proprietary (© Nash Information Services, all rights reserved; no public API — sold via OpusData/Data Services). Iceland is not a tracked territory, so it has ~nothing for domestic admissions/aðsókn (use the mirrored KMÍ áhorf pages instead) and only the rare Icelandic festival breakout with a US release overlaps — low payoff + legally fraught to scrape. Kept registered as a manual cross-check for worldwide gross on the few wide-release titles.

sources.title: Wikipedia (is) — Listi yfir íslenskar kvikmyndir
sources.notes: CC BY-SA. Server-rendered film list using {{Kvikmyndalisti}} templates (titill/frumsýnd/leikstjóri + kvikmyndir.is id). Source for the FILMS catalog (kvikmyndir.is films are Algolia-gated). confidence=needs_verification.

sources.title: producers.is — Samband íslenskra kvikmyndaframleiðenda (SÍK) félagaskrá
sources.notes: Authoritative member directory of Icelandic production companies (40 members w/ website/email/phone). Zone 2 `company` entity authority — the canonical anchor for company resolution against KMÍ allocations. confidence=verified for membership.

sources.title: kvikmyndir.is — Icelandic film & TV database (community)
sources.notes: Third-party Icelandic production catalog used to cross-reference the KMÍ ledger (what was produced/aired, with/without a grant). Series list is server-rendered; films are behind Algolia (not yet ingested). confidence=needs_verification.

sources.title: Manual curation (Kristján) — original hand-built JSON/TXT
sources.notes: User's pre-existing curated grant data (Styrkir Json/, kmi_grants_db.json, kmi_deliverables.json). High quality but unverified against the live source; treat as needs_verification until cross-checked.

sources.title: KMÍ domain lexicon (Icelandic↔English), compiled
sources.notes: 294 domain terms in 14 categories (is/en + category/literal/note). Compiled in db-import-staging from the academic theses + KMÍ/Klapptré/producers.is scrapes; each term carries a src label. Pure reference for prompting + Icelandic NLP term work. No collisions with any table.
